claim_boundary: Decision uses a bounded 320k-row probe over 23/64 available target shards; it is not full paper-target evaluation.
rationale: No-button false-positive rate is controlled below 0.10, but keyboard and mouse-button metrics remain orders of magnitude below the D2E paper-reported target.
Mouse movement Pearson is unavailable because this branch emits no useful motion predictions on the probe.
Continuing this exact branch would spend 4xH200 time without a plausible path to the paper target; the next branch should add stronger causal action/state structure rather than retune thresholds.

next_branch.name: streaming_exactset_causal_action_history
next_branch.required_change: Extend streaming IDM with exact-set keyboard/button softmax heads and causal action-history features, then train/evaluate on full D2E with calibrated FPR.
